transcript: A huge stake rolled down the slope. Everyone rushed to escape, but they didn't know the forest was home to an even more terrifying mystery man. The story begins. A group of young people are backpacking in a remote town, at the tavern. An old man warns them not to go up the mountain. It's full of danger. After all, they were young and impulsive. They don't listen. The people in the bar all looked at them differently. They just came out of the pub. They found someone loitering by their jeep. Adam got angry and threw a bottle at the mystery man. He disappeared. Even at night, when a young couple is about to have sex in bed, a dark figure suddenly appears outside the window. It was obvious they were being watched. The next day, the three couples set off for the mountains. Regardless of the discouragement, they were laughing and enjoying the nature. They didn't meet any other travelers along the way. Darius, the leader, suggested that they don't follow the signs to explore the underground fortresses nearby, although his girlfriend didn't meet any other travelers along the way. Darius, the leader, suggested that they don't follow the signs to explore the underground fortresses nearby, although his girlfriend didn't agree. But after a kiss, she was convinced. The woman in pink almost fell to the bottom of the mountain when her foot slipped. Before she realizes the extent of the danger, they encountered a huge stake rolling down the slope.
